task_name: Harden Builder Live Read Probe Mock Validation
goal: Harden the local Builder Live Read Probe mock with additional blocked fixtures and CLI golden-output checks, without enabling live Builder calls.
claims: BP-024 adds blocked fixtures for live mode and empty reads.
BP-024 tests the CLI output against golden fixture JSON, not only the exported function.
BP-024 does not alter the probe runtime to enable live, auth, secrets, DB, persistence, or writes.
assumptions: The BP-022 runtime already blocks live mode and empty reads.
Hardening can be achieved by tests and fixtures without runtime changes.
Review-suite integration from BP-022 remains the correct test entrypoint.
dod: Blocked live-mode and empty-reads fixtures exist.
tools/test-builder-live-read-probe.cjs compares CLI JSON output with golden output.
stop_conditions: Live Builder call, base URL, auth, secret, DB, persistence, write, execute, approval, or deploy behavior becomes necessary
prior_task_findings: BP-023 identified mode=live, empty reads, and CLI golden checks as the next safe local hardening boundary.
